channel.title: Download free software, update daily!

item.title: Download MedCalc 23.5.2
item.description: MedCalc is a statistical software for biomedical research can analyze many performance curve system with a set of rich functionality, chart types and advanced module. MedCalc was designed to meet the needs and requirements of the study nature and aims to analyze the statistical calculations of the project. This software provides the tools and means essential to analyze the characteristic curve of the system (ROC), drawing data and perform the statistical calculations. MedCalc -...

item.title: Download RapidRAW 1.5.3
item.description: RapidRAW is a modern, high-performance, open-source RAW photo editor, designed to deliver a fast and clean editing experience with a lightweight footprint (under 30MB). Built with performance and usability in mind, the software is aimed at photographers who want a simple, efficient, and fun workflow without compromising performance. Key Features GPU-accelerated processing: Uses a custom WGSL shader to process all image adjustments on the GPU, allowing for smooth, responsive editing...

item.title: Download ExifTool 13.54
item.description: ExifTool is a library of Perl platform-independent plus a command line application for reading, writing, and editing meta information in various file types. ExifTool supports many metadata formats including EXIF , GPS , IPTC , XMP , JFIF , GeoTIFF , ICC Profile , Photoshop IRB , FlashPix , AFCP and ID3 , as well as notes of the manufacturer of many digital cameras by Canon , Casio , DJI , FLIR , FujiFilm , GE , GoPro , HP , JVC / Victor , Kodak , Leaf , Minolta / Konica-Minolta , Motorola...

item.description: Abelssoft KeyDepot is a password manager software designed to securely store and manage passwords, logins, and other sensitive data. The software uses advanced encryption technology, specifically AES-256 encryption, to protect user data from unauthorized access. item.title: Download VovSoft PDF to Image Converter 1.6

This is a simple and effective method to convert PDF documents into image files. You can easily extract image files from PDF files with this software. PDF files can be added to the task list by selecting multiple files using the built-in file browser or by dragging and dropping them via Windows Explorer. item.title: Download MadPeel - AI Background Remover 1.0.1
item.description: Remove the background from any photo in seconds with professional AI precision. Works completely offline, ensuring 100% privacy because MadPeel never uploads your photos to the cloud; everything is processed directly on your PC.
